name: Super-Ancient Dinobeast
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>超古代恐獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>エンシェント・ダイノ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: You can Tribute Summon this card in face-up Attack Position by Tributing 1 Dinosaur monster. When a Dinosaur monster(s) is Special Summoned from your GY while this monster is on the field (except during the Damage Step): You can draw 1 card.
mnst_eff: You can Tribute Summon this card in face-up Attack Position by Tributing 1 Dinosaur monster. When a Dinosaur monster(s) is Special Summoned from your GY while this monster is on the field (except during the Damage Step): You can draw 1 card.
